name: pathfinder-extension
description: Pathfinder Chrome extension (frontend). Plain JS — no build step. devDependencies are test-only and do not affect how the extension loads.

scripts.test: node tests/scrape.test.mjs && node tests/detect.test.mjs && node tests/fixture-replay.test.mjs && node tests/observe.test.mjs && node tests/index.test.mjs && node tests/background.test.mjs && node tests/profileMapper.test.mjs && node tests/auth.test.mjs && node tests/profileApi.test.mjs && node tests/api.test.mjs && node tests/profileSetup.test.mjs && node tests/profileController.test.mjs && node tests/optimizeController.test.mjs && node tests/idleController.test.mjs && node tests/detectionController.test.mjs
